description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, featuring a plump, reddish-brown sausage nestled inside a soft, golden-brown bun. The sausage is topped with a generous zigzag of bright yellow mustard, which runs the length of the sausage and adds a vibrant contrast to the overall appearance. The bun is slightly rounded and appears fluffy, cradling the sausage securely on both sides. The sausage itself is smooth and cylindrical, with no visible grill marks or charring. There is no visible packaging or tray, and the hot dog is presented as if ready to eat. The overall look is appetizing and typical of street food found in urban parks, food trucks, or city events.
description: A plump sausage in a golden-brown bun, topped with a zigzag of yellow mustard, with no visible packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sausage and the zigzag mustard topping, with the bun cradling the sausage on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the sausage and bun, with the mustard line visible along the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the sausage and mustard from the opposite end, with the bun edges visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the bun and sausage profile with the mustard line running along the top.
